title: Croatian Peppery Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic pilaf from Croatia, infused with peppercorns and herbs.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add the peppercorns and let them infuse for 1 minute.
Add the chopped herbes and cook for another minute.
Add the pilaf rice and stir to coat with the oil and mix with the herbs.
Add the water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the rice is cooked.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and season with salt to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional herbes if desired.
